LAW AND MOTION 302,PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION PER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 664.6 IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED AS REQUESTED IN THE MOVING PAPERS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation
Off Calendar Jul-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.'s unopposed motion to enter judgment pursuant to stipulation per Code of Civil procedure section 664.6 is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, judgment shall be entered as requested in the moving papers.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
